title.zh: 《达特茅斯夏季人工智能研究项目提案》
title.en: A Proposal for the Dartmouth Summer Research Project on Artificial Intelligence

notes.zh: 约翰·麦卡锡档案保存的 1955 年原始提案文本，列明项目组织者、研究设想与七项研究议题。
notes.en: The original 1955 proposal preserved in John McCarthy's archive, naming the organizers, central conjecture, and seven research topics.

title.zh: 人工智能在达特茅斯得名

notes.zh: 达特茅斯学院关于 1956 年夏季研究项目及其学科历史地位的官方档案页面。
notes.en: Dartmouth College's official history page on the 1956 summer research project and its place in the field's history.

title.zh: 开启人工智能的思想聚会
title.en: The Meeting of the Minds That Launched AI

notes.zh: IEEE Spectrum 对 1956 年研讨会参与者、现场活动和后续影响的历史梳理。
notes.en: An IEEE Spectrum historical account of the workshop's participants, activities, and later significance.

title.zh: 1956 年达特茅斯事件迁移记录

notes.zh: 仅保留用于既有图片资源的迁移溯源，不作为正文事实依据或页面展示来源。
notes.en: Retained only for migrated image provenance; it is not used as evidence for the body copy or as a displayed source.
